title: ClearVision Shader
description: Ultra clear and bright shader with enhanced colors, smooth lighting, and built-in night vision for perfect visibility in all dimensions.
body:
ClearVision Shader enhances Minecraft with crystal clear visibility similar to night vision in all dimensions (Overworld, Nether, End).
It is optimized for every device — from low-end (potato) to high-end — ensuring smooth and stable FPS.
Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11 using OptiFine and Iris.
